report.summary: Researched and built two high-value learn guides — Chain Abstraction Guide 2026 and Crypto Prediction Markets Guide 2026 — with full SEO optimization, JSON-LD structured data, interactive PredictionMarketCalculator component, and both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Chain Abstraction 2026 — Particle Network 110K Universal Accounts (557% QoQ growth), UniversalX $5.9M avg daily volume. NEAR Chain Signatures live on mainnet supporting BTC/SOL/Cosmos/15+ chains via MPC. Socket Protocol: 300+ chains, billions in monthly volume. Messari 2026 Theses calls chain abstraction 'the key to victory.' 40M+ smart accounts deployed across Ethereum and L2s.

Topic 2: Crypto Prediction Markets 2026 — $5B weekly combined volume (Kalshi + Polymarket). Kalshi at 66% market share, $260M 2025 revenue, CFTC-regulated DCM. Polymarket $33.8B in 2025 volume, ICE $2B investment at $8-9B valuation, started 0.10% taker fees Feb 2026. Polymarket 73% accuracy rate, 84% for markets >$100K. Banned in 34 countries. AI agents (Polystrat) executing 4,200+ trades with 376% returns.
Both topics represent gaps in degen0x coverage with high search intent and growing market interest.
Sources: Messari Crypto Theses 2026, Blockworks, CoinMarketCap Academy, NEAR docs, Particle Network blog, The Block, Fensory, CoinDesk, Holland & Knight — all accessed March 2026.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Chain Abstraction Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 1386 lines): 8 sections — What is chain abstraction, comparison table (vs bridges vs account abstraction), 4 technical approaches (Universal Accounts, Chain Signatures, Intent-Based Execution, Orchestration APIs), 9-project ecosystem table, keystore rollups deep-dive, hype cycle analysis, risks & challenges, 6-question FAQ.

Crypto Prediction Markets Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, 560 lines): 8 sections — What are prediction markets (73% accuracy data), how they work (binary contracts, order books vs AMM, oracle resolution), platform profiles (Kalshi/Polymarket/Azuro/Drift BET/Gnosis/Hedgehog/Zeitgeist/Augur), comparison table, real-world use cases (elections/sports/crypto/AI), regulatory maze (US state conflicts + EU bans), risks, 6-question FAQ.
Both guides target intermediate audience with specific numbers, protocol names, and honest risk disclosures.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title: 'Chain Abstraction Guide 2026: One Account, Every Chain | degen0x' (59 chars)
Title: 'Crypto Prediction Markets Guide 2026: Polymarket, Kalshi & Beyond | degen0x' (73 chars)
OpenGraph article type with publishedTime/modifiedTime 2026-03-16, OG images on both pages
Twitter summary_large_image cards configured on both pages
JSON-LD: Article + FAQ schemas combined via combineSchemas(), rendered by StructuredData component on both pages
Internal links: 5 related degen0x pages per guide with descriptive anchor text
Target keywords: 'chain abstraction guide 2026', 'what is chain abstraction', 'Particle Network universal accounts', 'crypto prediction markets', 'Polymarket guide', 'Kalshi crypto'

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: PredictionMarketCalculator.tsx (NEW): Interactive binary outcome profit calculator — buy price slider (0.01-0.99), shares input, outcome toggle (Yes/No), real-time calculation of cost/payout/profit/ROI with visual probability bar. Pure React with useState, no external dependencies.
Integrated into prediction markets guide between 'How They Work' and 'Big Players' sections as 'Try It' interactive.
tsc --noEmit passed with zero errors on all new files.

sections.title: PUBLISH_QUEUE Updates
items: Added '/learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026' to top of PUBLISH_QUEUE
Added '/learn/crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026' to top of PUBLISH_QUEUE
PUBLISH_QUEUE now contains 7 items total
